raw.message: It's More Fun When It's For Fun!

hook.summary: A confident fan predicts a successful field goal while watching a game with friends.
hook.visual_action: A man in a Chiefs jersey stands in a living room holding a phone, talking to his friends who are watching TV.
hook.voiceover_transcript: He's automatic from the 40. You never count your money...

scene_flow: Friends in a living room watching a football game and discussing a kick.
A montage of fans celebrating and singing at a snowy outdoor tailgate party.
A crowded sports bar where fans are cheering and celebrating together.
A black screen with a 'Play responsibly' message followed by the DraftKings logo.
A final scene of basketball fans looking disappointed at a game.
on_screen_text: It's more fun when it's for fun
audience_proxy: Adult sports enthusiasts who enjoy the social and competitive aspects of sports betting.
